SEARCH
Package neqsim.process.equipment.expander

Class TurboExpanderMapIngestion.AnchorPoint

java.lang.Object
neqsim.process.equipment.expander.TurboExpanderMapIngestion.AnchorPoint
All Implemented Interfaces:
Serializable
Enclosing class:
TurboExpanderMapIngestion
public static class TurboExpanderMapIngestion.AnchorPoint extends Object implements Serializable
AnchorPoint captures a single certified operating point used to validate an assembled map.

  • Constructor Details

    • AnchorPoint

      public AnchorPoint(String label, double velocityRatio, double igvOpening, double expanderEfficiency)
      Constructs an anchor point.
      Parameters:
      label - human-readable label
      velocityRatio - velocity ratio U/C
      igvOpening - IGV opening (fraction of maximum area)
      expanderEfficiency - certified expander isentropic efficiency (0..1)
